targets.agent_summary: `src/nfa.rs` is a Rust implementation of the Aho-Corasick NFA builder/search automaton, covering trie construction, failure transitions, byte classes, and debug formatting. I checked it for install hooks, subprocess or network use, credential/secret access, dynamic code loading, obfuscation, persistence, and other supply-chain compromise indicators, and found no concrete malicious behavior.
